case_title: JACQUELINE TEICHERT VS. FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TEICHERT, JACQUELINE AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE LIN, TIFFANY LIN, PAUL LIN, KRISTA L. THE LANDMARK-UNION SQUARE OWNERS ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-20-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 SERVED JAN-06-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE LANDMARK-UNION SQUARE OWNERS ASSOCIATION
NOTICE OF ORDER IN ADDITION TO THE JUDGMENT OF APRIL 2, 2015 BY PRO TEM JUDGE DANIEL WEINGARTEN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM DANIEL WEINGARTEN, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT ON THE RECORD, D506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2015 - JUDGMENT. (SEE ORDER SUPPLEMENTAL TO JUDGMENT ISSUED THE SAME DAY.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2015 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-02-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT AGAINST KRISTA LIN, PAUL LIN AND TIFFANY IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANTS TIFFANY LIN; PAUL LIN; KRISTA LIN WHO WERE NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING IN COURT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT TIFFANY LIN. DEFENDANT THE LANDMARK UNION ETC. WAS REPRESENTED BY ALAN HABEGGER--PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE WAS REPRESENTED BY GAIL GAFFNEY--S.F. MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT AND SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT; & ON LETTERS TO PLAINTIFF FROM MICHAEL J. HUGHES SERVED FEB-20-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT TEICHERT, JACQUELINE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY TEICHERT, JACQUELINE FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE THE LANDMARK-UNION SQUARE OWNERS ASSOCIATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-02-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-02-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DANIEL WEINGARTEN. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANTS WERE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM DANIEL WEINGARTEN, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT ON THE RECORD, D506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-02-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-02-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DANIEL WEINGARTEN. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANTS WERE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM DANIEL WEINGARTEN, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT ON THE RECORD, D506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TEICHERT, JACQUELINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE THE LANDMARK-UNION SQUARE OWNERS ASSOCIATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.610 - THE PREVAILING PARTY IS ENTITLED TO THE COSTS OF THE ACTION, INCLUDING THE COSTS OF SERVING THE ORDER FOR THE APPEARANCE OF THE DEFENDANT. JUDGMENT CORRECTED TO REFLECT THAT THE CROSS-COMPLAINANT/DEFENDANT SHALL TAKE NOTHING FROM THE CROSS-DEFENDANT/PLAINTIFF ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
